name: Cold-induced PA28gamma proteasomes in C. elegans and human cells
summary: C. elegans and human-cell experiments testing whether cold-induced PA28gamma/PSME-3 proteasome activation supports longevity and reduces disease-related protein aggregation.
model_system: C. elegans temperature-shift longevity and aggregation models, HEK293 human cells, and iPSC-derived motor neuron models
